## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover new/changed behavior (positive and negative where relevant)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README or others) if behavior or claims changed
- [ ] The change is in scope, with no unrelated edits
- [ ] No real secrets or credentials in code, tests, or fixtures
